cooked:
OK, people, here you have attached a .ZIP file, which contains one file: RAYMOND.LDC. Its the body model for Raymond-the-elf for LBA 2. I edited the colors of Joes model, so here you have Raymond.

To put it into the BODY.HQR file, use either WinHQR or LBA Package Editor (recommended). Have fun with it.

Raymond.zip (2.57 KB)
raw:
OK, people, here you have attached a .ZIP file, which contains one file: RAYMOND.LDC. It's the body model for Raymond-the-elf for LBA 2. I edited the colors of Joe's model, so here you have Raymond.
 
To put it into the BODY.HQR file, use either WinHQR or LBA Package Editor (recommended). Have fun with it.

[Raymond.zip|attachment](upload://5cueTmezxMXrLmcYTczFJKK2OFP.zip) (2.57 KB)

cooked:
""ChaosFish"":

(its entry 111 btw)

Do you plan to release a program that changes the color of models?

  1. Not necessarily. If you want, I can teach you, how to add a new model at the end, and then add a new Body-Entity instance to Joe in the File3D table.
  2. Yes, Im thinking about that. Now, that I know, how to change colors in both LBA 1 and LBA 2, Ill start the work on it soon. But before, I would like to release LBA 2 Saved Game Editor and LBA2.HQR Editor first.
""Jasiek"":

I think that it would be a lot nicer to have a program that would rip th island models from LBA2 and save them as a hightmap as an image file. Or to rip the character animations, but its probably a long way till that

I already wanted to make an island height map viewer, but I think its better, if we wait, until yaz0r makes his island viewer, as his one would show the islands, along with the textures, while mine would only show the island height maps.

""Tophars"":

can we choose what scene you start in lba2 yet?

Of course, just replace some files in both LBA_BKG.HQR and SCENE.HQR. The same goes for LBA 1, only that there, you must change LBA_BLL.HQR, LBA_BRK.HQR, and LBA_GRI.HQR instead of just LBA_BKG.HQR.
raw:
[quote=""ChaosFish""]
(it's entry 111 btw)

Do you plan to release a program that changes the color of models?
[/quote]
1. Not necessarily. If you want, I can teach you, how to add a new model at the end, and then add a new Body-Entity instance to Joe in the File3D table.
2. Yes, I'm thinking about that. Now, that I know, how to change colors in both LBA 1 and LBA 2, I'll start the work on it soon. But before, I would like to release LBA 2 Saved Game Editor and LBA2.HQR Editor first.
 
[quote=""Jasiek""]
I think that it would be a lot nicer to have a program that would rip th island models from LBA2 and save them as a hightmap as an image file. Or to rip the character animations, but it's probably a long way till that :(
[/quote]
I already wanted to make an island height map viewer, but I think it's better, if we wait, until yaz0r makes his island viewer, as his one would show the islands, along with the textures, while mine would only show the island height maps.
 
[quote=""Tophars""]
can we choose what scene you start in lba2 yet?
[/quote]
Of course, just replace some files in both LBA_BKG.HQR and SCENE.HQR. The same goes for LBA 1, only that there, you must change LBA_BLL.HQR, LBA_BRK.HQR, and LBA_GRI.HQR instead of just LBA_BKG.HQR.

cooked: Its sort of weird, that the program can read from the file, but not convert it into a different file, I used the model viewer, Im quite capable of copying every model that is in there, but the animation is a lot harder to do.
raw: It's sort of weird, that the program can read from the file, but not convert it into   a different file, I used the model viewer, I'm quite capable of copying every model that is in there, but the animation is a lot harder to do.

cooked:
""Golemboy"":

obras didnt you say ages ago that you were going to make a colour editor? could you maybe even just write a tutorial of how to alter the hex in the meantime?

Actually, yes, but I didnt know yet, how to change the colors in the LBA 1 models, so I decided to not start working at it yet. Now I know, how to change the colors in the LBA 1 models, too, so I can finally make this program. For more information, read this quote:

""OBrasilo"":

Yes, Im thinking about that. Now, that I know, how to change colors in both LBA 1 and LBA 2, Ill start the work on it soon. But before, I would like to release LBA 2 Saved Game Editor and LBA2.HQR Editor first.
raw:
[quote=""Golemboy""]
obras didnt you say ages ago that you were going to make a colour editor? could you maybe even just write a tutorial of how to alter the hex in the meantime?
[/quote]
 
Actually, yes, but I didn't know yet, how to change the colors in the LBA 1 models, so I decided to not start working at it yet. Now I know, how to change the colors in the LBA 1 models, too, so I can finally make this program. For more information, read this quote:
[quote=""OBrasilo""]
Yes, I'm thinking about that. Now, that I know, how to change colors in both LBA 1 and LBA 2, I'll start the work on it soon. But before, I would like to release LBA 2 Saved Game Editor and LBA2.HQR Editor first.
[/quote]
